The '''Binayre Razorcat''' was a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] route stemming from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. It was dominated by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], namely the [[Binayre Pirates]] and the [[Hidden Daggers]].

{{Route-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' describes this as an area of space rather than a hyperspace route.
